textByHash.018a46a2615ce54ed17a32e0a4fc15a03ac17e12: It's alright Laddie, I'm just joking.
textByHash.01eacafde8ca4ee8eb03fc42b8574556ce20a52b: You know that apart from being heavy it's also very soft, don't you? It'd be a pointless waste!
textByHash.0413dc79fe8a969e8ead7c2c9f295eb52c92c578: Okay, here we go, hold on to your helmet!
textByHash.0508feaf1eec32562d304b8ca4abc332723a0bb3: Ran into him? How do you mean?
textByHash.07e25df68796172c215a08fcdb79c35e27c73504: But we're so close to all that gold!
textByHash.091cb43d19b7249e5cfefea35dd60a3ee30b38d7: Oh, and you'll also need a golden helmet of course. Would hurt quite a bit otherwise.
textByHash.0951a79fc9a1af8b579cd57156e6de02f31620d4: A book? How's a book going to help? What's in it?
textByHash.0b229a09aba3e8f8f6ad066f2778684355f577b2: If I had the right schematics for it, I could probably work with that. But I don't.
textByHash.0c71d701a2ba6e7c500a4bb4d02b65b4745628c0: They're not in it! They can't fish if their lives depended on it!
textByHash.130adae3fd3148d3d47d6e068c303ae2e0fdc558: No, no, what we need is a different material of cannonballs. The hardest, toughest you can find.
textByHash.161a3848855b9ee1b5ac3839337cdb14a951a312: Suit yourself, I don't need any help from a human anyway!
textByHash.1a66b728a301d92a95cce318308921eeebc2781e: This doesn't make any sense, it's all jumbled up! Sort it out, will you, don't torment an old dwarf with nonsensical drawings!
textByHash.1a86658fe72cd1061c10e5c8e2b3d84769523c18: At first we thought there might be a huge treasure behind the rock, you see.
textByHash.1af7f5f12d315131ff92a1f6ad45537487f50b93: He'll be back, but not for a few thousand years, I'm sure.
textByHash.1e131ecaae0352b72965baf5a38480f5539735d7: You killed a wyvern? Last I heard they were all dead.
textByHash.1ea1d4488b01102b93dc4f8ea73a82928abc5329: Then run along and find them!
textByHash.2061f473369dddeb588fb2eda92620fd0028b629: No, it wasn't. Didn't do anything! Nothing at all!
textByHash.225e3e74466378a6d77e216359768d38b79756bb: Are you sure you want me to fire it at the rock? It's going to make a nasty dent in it. In the cannonball that is.
textByHash.25927104757af7e87f030b2c572665f278b12b47: Perfect gold? That's much too valuable to be used to make cannonballs!
textByHash.26cf4b769063466de638d80fc3180186be803c2a: Well, then I had an even more clever idea!
textByHash.28a3954fe343a4e83a94721dea0244c8c40cd6af: It breaks my heart to ruin such a fine piece of crafting, but it's your gold... Alright, let's load it up then.
textByHash.297e9dff69b540fc196e041ef69810c5b65d349b: If I were selling my granite boots, which I'm clearly not, I would certainly not accept a mere coins for them.
textByHash.2980b300037d8e84b42ea20a8061e0a4cfe7090f: No, but that's where you come in!
textByHash.2a4dc843b731bb89cda1b6b8421ffb7fc55f67af: [laugh], you want me to make a golden cannonball?
textByHash.2daf001c3d072173bbf69c7d69291a64505434f9: Cozy? No, not really, it's damp and cold!
textByHash.3200e8ea43ce9122cc229b55e0c0a31ef1b31c99: Don't be silly, I'm sure there must be some known material that will affect it.
textByHash.3245c9c9e2821d37c16080eb3af967623a42ca1f: Oh, just fine, just fine! This gold is certainly creating a steady flow of income for me! After the company takes some of the cut, of course.
textByHash.3486655cb19e0917f3a1d9524bd39a263bcb26c9: I put an even bigger pile of coins together to get some rune cannonballs! Good idea, right?
textByHash.356af1766ef2e8f511d19dc4367f776cc25064f6: Where'd you get those from? Did you make your own?
textByHash.35af0ad866054accb410e3caeca000ce386894c5: The only problem is that I have run out of ideas on how to do it.
textByHash.35d96b976c4bb8b28cdc4d0408401fe6710bd452: You need to wear that golden helmet... unless you want to crack open your skull on the rock.
textByHash.35f268e231aa18ade12eaeb338ae72a1365e34b4: [laugh], I bet you would, I bet you would!
textByHash.3897afa8244d9610a89aeb5b5d7c3792ac4d63fe: Well, yes, it did... when it bounced back onto the ground it did.
textByHash.3a0c19b7095196569cf691479953c67f37ac8f91: Besides, I'm rather fond of them now... best boots I ever had!
textByHash.43d0b65711ef98477a78c7f29d81e2cf33eda3f5: Well, it's not so simple... like I said, I need to make some modifications to my cannon. They're not really designed to fire humans, you know.
textByHash.452611860f6be028c0acf2b7ec2de385ece776cd: Schematics to modify my cannon, and a golden helmet for you to wear.
textByHash.45b161be3e702984161438fd2f931dbb3873df8a: You're a human! This is a dwarven thing!
textByHash.498e637cb647db70b00ede32d4f3802c82dbc1e5: Excellent, excellent, I'll get the cannon ready to fire then!
textByHash.4e0843e17877a534cfc78235df5e935b5787682c: No, but then we'll never know until we've tried it, right?
textByHash.57375a6c38ca98f288c57737076ec5329b930d00: Now tell me, how do I break open the rock?
textByHash.5bdc5247019941adbfaaf5bcf23da1fedd71856d: I was able to borrow a cannon from the Black Guard, my son was able to pull some strings you know.
textByHash.5cd1342f323ae11e107b9708f4d35a95a9a3f3f1: So are you ready to have another go in the rock?
textByHash.60fe1d0398fb3ecf62a41266433327a3185e7591: That's it, yes! Here, I have one part of the schematics, sent to me by some prankster dwarf, I don't even remember his name. You'll have to find the rest on your own.
textByHash.612974963e72d48a9db81b4ad5a359aa2928557b: What, are you trying to scam old Dondakan? You want me to sell these boots for a measly coins?
textByHash.61abb48f3d7a229b62b6fb9b853d694ae2000678: I don't know! Wish I knew!
textByHash.6245a6fb63679dcb5851be36a27a31d73d4d77a0: I don't really know how, actually. Never been much of an engineer.
textByHash.64171bae2d992afa8b967823f908b6b56c0fce99: Yes yes, I heard you the first time.
textByHash.661e70def4add997a34ba569e91bba51ea86e6e3: Until we had a look further down the stream, around the rock... no, there's no treasure there, just a dead end.
textByHash.69c1e2353bf1fef2ec55503e4b0f16b76c06423e: Because obviously there are vast deposits of minerals inside the rock! And if not, I want to harness the extreme hardness of the rock itself!
textByHash.6b2214f0eb1bda2cd8c008af05644b8a78295c5c: Probably banished it to some hellish realm or other.
textByHash.6cd51018ad175c5e532e38da642a11da2c47184d: Well, I'm the only one left... all the others gave up. Said it wasn't worth their while anymore. Wouldn't have a good return profit on their time investment.
textByHash.6d0c51be45aba94b1bba572886b23eca4818dfce: No no, thank you! After all these years, the riddle of the rock has finally been cracked!
textByHash.6fd2958fa73b9745a99d0fa42d58d5ec8bacb7b1: Not a clue! I don't even know how many parts there are. It's probably best to ask any dwarven engineers that you might know.
textByHash.7267a38b4d925e0f04f6bce9cb3a858f2bd3f54b: And it could be that someone in the mines or the city here knows where this part came from. Didn't you talk to someone in Keldagrim already? Just ask around!
textByHash.7391faf08900abd66a5c79b0529757e7c7772cf4: Very simple. I'll have to make a few modifications to my cannon so that it can fire a human, and you'll need a golden helmet of course.
textByHash.74862e402662d041529893e3657cb4b66eada6ec: You're so poor, you don't even have that much gold on you...
textByHash.75f6d394d12d82201deb5f1c2ee33d8e65ddf56d: I don't believe it! All this time, I've been spending all my gold on opening the rock... I could've just thrown it at it!
textByHash.771d3d70c70c3f628dfd16be28340f91ef0ee1e2: Apart from coating the rock with soot? Not really, no.
textByHash.78cda4014b37c9cc5e19e05f93dcaf312abedcfc: The whole cave was shaking! What happened in there?
textByHash.79e39a43be4ba40170bfcb7879749ee4913e9384: It looks nice, but it's not much use as a projectile.
textByHash.7a8fd811304c6c245563274bafc89cabcfe00d20: Well... you are the Fishing Champion... but I still can't really speak about this.
textByHash.7bdad042699b239822f2f6af6fc51cf569ae20bc: Go on then... leave an old dwarf to his work.
textByHash.7ec3baba38caad84ac63592d041a37b4c8ea8266: Unless you want to die when I shoot you at the rock?
textByHash.8080c824db05c1d61fa7d4cd2304652d276395c5: That's quite a sum of money, which I notice you don't even have on you.
textByHash.8160a1be0e420088bb4bf3716227e4dfa80c1829: Of course, steel cannonballs didn't make a dent. But then ol' Donnie had a clever idea.
textByHash.81a5516f5b98df37d9e27df89fc83ce87d0f544c: Perhaps if you were to help some of my fellow dwarves...
textByHash.82f670c73671ad519a401433d0d74d623dc0e750: That's where you come in! Run along now!
textByHash.86a6c30ce7aec3ada2f103eda724fc50b26730e6: Might want to pick up that cannonball again while you're at it!
textByHash.878a56133bfcef2499427f088a18c4ea45415767: Tell you what, if you make a golden cannonball and give it to me, I'll fire it at the rock.
textByHash.88248c8d43610460234a114ce910b568f3ed49e7: Don't worry, it'll all be over in a moment!
textByHash.89304d7d449d5fc6c5f8505a57b718e04440cfa8: I want you to find out some more information on the rock.
textByHash.8cb3f07b8f3029920fae411d9a6e6ce02ad6f18f: Nice idea, , but no one will buy a golden cannonball!
textByHash.8ce8fc891e26da0492d811b169e828ffe45d3d01: Just think of all that gold!
textByHash.8db74d22636e3dca3fda85fdcdf1631eeb4c033b: Yes, you already showed me that. But I'm not going to waste my own gold on it, make a cannonball and bring it to me.
textByHash.93f899cde618f308f28dbe8d81bff4af5dd8dd15: Well, off you go now! Start running, start talking!
textByHash.955f86f7c18b041819170fcba2d241542feb0193: Great, because I don't want to sell them.
textByHash.96bf2d1ca3e50b67e54d17a0133b1197ac439389: Oh dear, oh dear. It seems firing you head first into a rock was perhaps not the best idea, you've gone absolutely loony.
textByHash.970f1c5d985f4e3ea22fa06fa281a4608df9713f: Did... did... did you see that?
textByHash.9ab4f0de2c63bd997a2eea308bba38f8b1ada8e9: So, tell me! What did you see inside! Is there any gold in there?
textByHash.a3719fb41a8fdfc94e272cccb1443fcbfc4e1697: I'm sorry, you will have to wait a moment, this schematic is more complex than I thought.
textByHash.a66aac41e0b47118efba89bf905df16913e3269c: Then I'll fire you at the rock so you can do a little reconnaissance. Don't worry, you should land safely on the other side of the rock.
textByHash.aa3dd31bd45449f6451f0a69a9f623e4c688cc22: But we have to get some better understanding of what this thing actually is. Maybe then we can find a way to break it open.
textByHash.ab2d7ecf90a9b48b8be2fe747ccc76c082b40b46: Wonderful! These schematics look simple enough... are you ready for your quick trip through the rock then?
textByHash.ab73ac47dbbe4d085d41c36c0938514bb2828f31: Okay, here we go, let me have a look at those schematics and we'll get started.
textByHash.acff708c694efed110141429c0f354e119f10648: Latest thing I've tried are these boots.
textByHash.afa4f3fc4043ae8cd9f2cc29798cb360d435b3b9: Pity I'm not selling my boots, not for any price or any item.
textByHash.b19dafc061513685ee6c558a5ab409e95c65f456: And this spirit you speak of? Was it guarding the gold?
textByHash.b2155e8a53ee44bdc33459a45db10adcae0afa0e: Look, try the city, further down the stream here. There's bound to be someone there who knows something. If you still can't find anyone, go to the librarian, he knows a lot.
textByHash.b6b8dd828c6f2bf16b9178fb1f3c95a5353ae5aa: It's not a wall! It's a rock!
textByHash.b7a003d8b74cfbbb659d4664bfbe7b8702b8ba6f: I'll guard my cannon and fire more cannonballs at it, of course! Wish I had your job, mine's a tough one!
textByHash.b835cb33d95791c5eef7d8849f09087c0aba96f2: They're made out of granite! I don't have enough money left to make granite cannonballs though. But see!
textByHash.bb6f629293699912407f8c320fc922fc5af0ab58: Yes, just to see what's inside... to see if all that gold is really embedded inside it.
textByHash.c114a7b8270996b99b49bd3ee7313c6678e013ec: Another cannon? How will that help?
textByHash.c15ad8111a5fafb08be081f048988f2e3c500c79: That... that... that's an amazing looking cannonball!
textByHash.c1c7ea7eedf3befd67b31ed607ce3d30a79227a2: Of course, of course! Whenever you want to go back in there, let me know... just don't forget to bring your helmet!
textByHash.c32931bc85cfa3866f4242ac37767a4f14d79782: Let me have a look at that!
textByHash.c430492c3259a27423a9fac9d2678bba3c2f0c15: I hear there is a fishing competition that a few of my distant kinsmen are keen on winning, for instance.
textByHash.c44d5b5598fc53d6771107cbf707c0c98d4d0f3f: But in the mean time, there's plenty of gold for me!
textByHash.c4b82c7f488652dbc52dca32ee3c065f226466f3: Then there was the time when we set fire to this whole section of the cave. What a smell that made!
textByHash.c4e2cadc7681da7acdf05af8460637905c2c05bf: But I no longer need the money, this rock is generating plenty!
textByHash.c783a53d1d0e2820caa0bce59da1b269c8c12a54: Don't be silly now. It's just a rock... just a rock with lots of gold in it!
textByHash.caf0fca3748220b85fc5b46a59a7d9f68db2c16e: Not without wearing your golden helmet you're not!
textByHash.cd28e8c16ff6970ae75fd74964a1237374b7a014: Of course I have, I'm holding this rune pickaxe, aren't I? We've been trying to mine through it for years!
textByHash.cd9cf07089c349d985122264b2a3e0d2029b9f90: Well, if it is, that must mean you must kill it! Simple!
textByHash.d05fd87d7b14da2ef2999cfd68530621f22f14e2: That's because there wasn't anything to see! Even granite doesn't do anything to it!
textByHash.d126fdf0f4c905eba1c70cbb74a35b760b73991f: Well, go ahead and wear your helmet! Won't protect your head if it's not on your head!
textByHash.d71b372fe678e20708be1404c4c0a54a09f6f04b: I'm guarding the cannon. Won't do us much good if it were stolen, would it?
textByHash.db15060596dfd116e1c429061fb654f69b39dd9e: I don't want anything from you right now.
textByHash.dcc96467c7f5c2eaf63980488ff8bcdf012f1709: I made this adamantite cannonball, you see! Cost me quite a pile of coins too!
textByHash.dd28109062e2fa28e1d31570539f6ffa9c4e1e07: And here, have this rune pickaxe as well, I can just use a normal one now anyway.
textByHash.ded6308e755444680903bc98a35937f24a8058ca: How much gold would you be willing to pay for it? Not that I'm selling my boots, mind, I'm just curious.
textByHash.e2fa3934f086905e0af4059b7b4fcbaaedef2ff8: Why, I'll just shoot you through it so you can have a look, won't I?
textByHash.e313604cd9d69cf59d521346eada31d49bed351a: Gold! I knew it! I struck gold! I'm set for life!
textByHash.e5ad47289e8822c5f102b54d4561dfd0a5358415: I still need those schematics to modify my cannon. It doesn't normally fire humans, you know.
textByHash.e81b0ae257b40f0200fe4e07a7ba1dcb2157ba1d: I just wanted to see how high you would go!
textByHash.e8de89374369b8de005d88768a3b5b523f247dce: Oh, be more careful! Here, have a copy, but don't lose it again!
textByHash.e98ebb849b9ade791c266d0cbafb48c8c29b7bc3: Oh, for Guthix' sake, it's perfectly simple! See, that rock over there, it's impenetrable!
textByHash.e9c8b21a23756511ee0ad3a3dccea05029c7737f: Yes yes, well, get going now, why don't you? I'll guard the cannon while you're away.
textByHash.ed0da096004cd4257e72412eec6d07f6a858e6ab: No, it has to be a helmet made out of solid gold. Gold plated helmets contain so little actual gold, it'd be a bit dangerous.
textByHash.ee999e542ed70dd6104d5f9fbc8496590d583a78: My legs are too old and worn to do much running around anymore, I'm afraid.
textByHash.f17910f4b88ebaf6532d7313fd4318c9b38d96b7: What, you mean these granite boots?
textByHash.f2fecec8ffc7196dc63e91d45e5e0898690f3b75: Ah, such enthusiasm! Okay, here we go, let me have a look at those schematics and we'll get started.
textByHash.f3bcfea79fa9e0fb886f9aebeb3cc89426cca282: Maybe you should speak to Lawgof, the Commander of the Black Guard in Kandarin.
textByHash.f46159557379c0b66705d69ab3d6c4d6148ac40c: Of course, just a second, let me adjust my cannon again.
textByHash.f634a9c9e5f479d90f7b62233e0ebafefbc2d3fe: Well, we're not very much closer to a solution then, are we?
textByHash.f684d445333ea6a109ed918e84a464b2811b2151: Perhaps a young adventurer like you is willing to help out an old dwarf like me? Want to find out what's inside the rock?
textByHash.f6f8f742ef00e26e84a0f8fe34a5b30deb14fd8b: Hmm, I suppose you have a point there.
textByHash.f6fa6b51cf46cc64a8517154958f671553ea1b09: Hey, that's quite a bit of money. Which you don't have on you. Oh well, I wasn't selling my boots anyway.
textByHash.f843ce9fb7e1e255821234e23a8ed2e6595c10dc: You'll need a golden helmet as well, if you want to survive the blast.
textByHash.f8648bb534dcf0cec8a0e5cd6b31cbb8d05fed4b: The cannon is a top-secret dwarven project, you know.
textByHash.f9992d1cf752a10ed759c172fec8dc2e9828b24c: What am I supposed to do with that?
textByHash.fdea3e2c5535e3f71d2cada8d4c7011da2612b51: At one time, we had a hundred dwarves in here, all picking away at the rock. Didn't do a thing.
textByHash.ffb2f9836dbe3e0e2e7aa934299d7531f0b3b5c5: No, it seemed more like it... gave way for a second... That's interesting...
